# Husnain Ahmed

- Android & iOS app publishing

## Experience

### Full Stack Developer — Mebius S.r.l (May 2023 – Present)
Rome, Italy
- Integrating open-source and third-party tools into existing systems
- Designing, coding, and maintaining dynamic websites and applications
- Debugging, testing, and optimizing databases and applications
- Web projects: shopper.mebius.it, mccustomers.mebius.it, voc.mebius.it, abf.mebius.it, inaabf.mebius.it
- App projects: Mystery Client (Android & iOS)

### Full Stack Developer — Innover Srl (January 2021 – April 2023)
Rome, Italy
- Developing dynamic websites and web applications for corporate, e-commerce, and educational clients
- Coordinating with developer team on code modules, debugging, and testing
- Web projects: lab.fincontinuo.com, over.oltreassicurazioni.it, bancadelfucino.innover.cloud, innover.cloud
- App projects: Chiomha, Fincontinuo App, UTC Clock, Permesso di Soggiorno

### Web Developer — Codian Soft (January 2018 – November 2020)
Karachi, Pakistan
- Attending team meetings, developing features, writing code in HTML/CSS, JavaScript, SQL, PHP
- Web projects: newalkebulanschools.com, islamabadproperty.pk, gradeyourschool.at
